allow: Bash(git commit -m "feat: canvas shell, config, state, player creation, start screen")
Bash(git commit -m "feat: complete rendering, kill feed, game loop, AI bots")
Bash(git commit -m "chore: final paper.io clone — fully playable")
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -m "chore: final paper.io clone — fully playable")
Bash(git commit -m "fix: return after enemy-trail kill, O\(1\) BFS dequeue in bfsDirection")
Bash(git commit -m "fix: rename playerColor variable to selectedColor \(shadowed function playerColor\)")
Bash(git commit -m "docs: 3D rendering design — Three.js InstancedMesh approach")
Bash(git commit -m "fix: human death shows death screen via playerKilled CustomEvent")
Bash(git commit -m "fix: PerspectiveCamera 60deg + scene.add\(sun.target\) for correct shadows")
Bash(git commit -m "perf: hoist brightMap and Vector3 out of animation frame loop")
Bash(git commit -m "chore: remove debug logs, dead code, stray spec file; fix .gitignore")
